languages.text: Манипулус готов начать эксперимент — он ожидает Вольного Торговца у операционных столов.
The Manipulus is ready to begin the experiment — he is waiting for the Rogue Trader by the operating tables.
languages.original_text: Манипулус готов начать эксперимент — он ожидает Вольного Торговца у операционных столов.

traits.locale_text: The Manipulus is ready to begin the experiment — he is waiting for the Rogue Trader by the operating tables.
The Manipulus is ready to begin the experiment — he is waiting for the Rogue Trader by the operating tables.
The Manipulus is ready to begin the experiment — he is waiting for the Rogue Trader by the operating tables.

languages.text: マニピュラスは実験の準備が整った。彼は手術台でローグトレーダーを待っている。
languages.original_text: The Manipulus is ready to begin the experiment — he is waiting for the Rogue Trader by the operating tables.

traits.locale_text: マニピュラスは実験の準備が整った。彼は手術台でローグトレーダーを待っている。

languages.text: 操纵者准备开始实验了——他在手术台旁等待着行商浪人。
languages.original_text: The Manipulus is ready to begin the experiment — he is waiting for the Rogue Trader by the operating tables.

traits.locale_text: 操纵者准备开始实验了——他在手术台旁等待着行商浪人。

languages.text: Le manipulus est prêt à commencer l'expérience. Il attend {mf|le libre-marchand|la libre-marchande} près des tables d'opération.
languages.original_text: The Manipulus is ready to begin the experiment — he is waiting for the Rogue Trader by the operating tables.

traits.locale_text: Le manipulus est prêt à commencer l'expérience. Il attend {mf|le libre-marchand|la libre-marchande} près des tables d'opération.

languages.text: El manipulus está listo para comenzar el experimento. Espera a{mf|l| la} Comerciante Independiente junto a las mesas de operación.
languages.original_text: The Manipulus is ready to begin the experiment — he is waiting for the Rogue Trader by the operating tables.

traits.locale_text: El manipulus está listo para comenzar el experimento. Espera a{mf|l| la} Comerciante Independiente junto a las mesas de operación.

languages.text: Manipülus deneye başlamaya hazır. Ameliyat masalarının yanında Hür Tacir'i bekliyor.
languages.original_text: The Manipulus is ready to begin the experiment — he is waiting for the Rogue Trader by the operating tables.

traits.locale_text: Manipülus deneye başlamaya hazır. Ameliyat masalarının yanında Hür Tacir'i bekliyor.

languages.text: Der Manipulus ist bereit, mit dem Experiment zu beginnen. Er warten an den Operationstischen auf {mf|den Freihändler|die Freihändlerin}.
languages.original_text: The Manipulus is ready to begin the experiment — he is waiting for the Rogue Trader by the operating tables.
